# Ibrutinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ibrutinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ibrutinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ibrutinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Imbruvica in combination with rituximab, cyclophosphamide, doxorubicin, vincristine, and prednisolone (IMBRUVICA + R-CHOP) alternating with R-DHAP (or R-DHAOx) without Imbruvica, followed by...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>mantle cell lymphoma（95.0%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hypergammaglobulinemia（91.8%）</li>
<li>monoclonal paraproteinemia disease（91.2%）</li>
<li>thyroid gland mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（88.4%）</li>
<li>small intestinal mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（88.4%）</li>
<li>small intestinal Burkitt lymphoma（88.3%）</li>
<li>breast mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（88.1%）</li>
<li>tonsillar lymphoma（88.0%）</li>
<li>marginal zone lymphoma（88.0%）</li>
<li>extracutaneous mastocytoma（87.7%）</li>
<li>neoplasm of mature B-cells（86.5%）</li>
<li>familial thrombocytosis（85.8%）</li>
<li>lymphoma, non-Hodgkin, familial（85.6%）</li>
<li>Richter syndrome（85.3%）</li>
<li>macroglobulinemia（84.9%）</li>
<li>B-cell neoplasm（84.5%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma, susceptibility to, 1（83.5%）</li>
<li>lymphoplasmacytic lymphoma（83.3%）</li>
<li>metastatic neoplasm（83.1%）</li>
<li>malignant spiradenoma（83.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ibrutinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
